commit.message:
Optimize timeline overlap detection and harden tests (#109)

* Initial plan

* perf: optimize timeline overlap detection

* perf: replace active.shift() with index pointer in detectParallelIds

shift() is O(n) because it shifts all elements left. Using a front
pointer that advances past expired spans avoids this cost, improving
eviction from O(n) to O(1) per span.

Also restores JSDoc documenting the sweep-line algorithm and NaN
filtering behavior.

refactor: split types/index.ts monolith into domain-specific files (#106)

* Initial plan

* refactor: split types/index.ts monolith into domain-specific files

Split the 783-line packages/types/src/index.ts into 8 domain-specific
files with consistent documentation headers:

- session.ts: Session management, health, todos, checkpoints
- conversation.ts: Turns, tool calls, events
- analytics.ts: Analytics, tool analysis, code impact, health scoring
- export.ts: Export config/results, session comparison
- replay.ts: Replay state and steps
- tool-rendering.ts: Rich renderer types and defaults
- config.ts: App config, pricing, updates, git metadata
- search.ts: FTS search types and indexing progress

index.ts is now a clean barrel re-exporting from all domain files.
Fixed circular imports in models.ts and defaults.ts (now import
from config.ts instead of index.ts).

- Compose UI with 5 tracking service toggle cards (Bluetooth, WiFi, GPS, Mobile Data, Carrier Signal)
- Auto turn-off settings with configurable timer for BT/WiFi/GPS/Mobile Data
- Real-time service state monitoring via system broadcasts and callbackFlow
- Clean Architecture: Model → Data (ServiceController) → UI (ViewModel + Compose)
- Hilt DI, Material 3 theming, accessibility semantics
- GitHub Actions CI: build, test, lint on PR
- Copilot instructions, Android senior agent, and 8 agent skills

* fix: address all PR review comments

- Add Apache 2.0 license headers to all Kotlin source files
- Rename requestDisable/toggleService to openSettings/openServiceSettings
- Fix modifier parameter ordering in all Composables (modifier first)
- Move all hardcoded strings to strings.xml with stringResource()
- Switch manifest theme from legacy Material to custom Theme.AntiTracker
- Remove unused location permissions (ACCESS_FINE/COARSE_LOCATION)
- Fix expand button touch target from 32dp to 48dp minimum
- Fix non-local returns in ViewModel update{} lambdas (return@update)
- Restart auto-off countdown when timer value changes
- Wrap BluetoothAdapter.isEnabled in try/catch for SecurityException
- Fix mobile data detection: use TelephonyManager.isDataEnabled instead
  of checking active network transport (was wrong when WiFi is active)
- Add MainViewModelTest with 7 unit tests covering auto-off logic

* fix: add MainDispatcherRule for ViewModel unit tests

viewModelScope uses Dispatchers.Main which is unavailable in JVM unit
tests. Added a TestWatcher rule that sets/resets Main dispatcher, and
added advanceUntilIdle() calls to ensure coroutines complete.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

The rule is exposed as a public property via @get:Rule, so it cannot
be private-in-file. Moved it above FakeServiceController.

* fix: remove premature advanceUntilIdle after timer-starting ops

advanceUntilIdle() after setTimer/setAutoTurnOff was completing the
entire delay immediately, causing the countdown to fire before the
test expected it. Now only advance time manually with advanceTimeBy().

- Remove statusBarColor override from Theme.kt (conflicts with edge-to-edge)
- Replace hardcoded status text with stringResource() calls
- Fix stale comment 'toggle' → 'open settings' in ServiceCard
- Use formatted string resource for toast (%1\ placeholder)
- Add extraBufferCapacity=1 to SharedFlow, use tryEmit, call

- Fix GPS isInUse: set false instead of mirroring isEnabled

- Add semantics(mergeDescendants=true) to auto-off Row for a11y

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: localize service labels and enforce timer minimum

- ShizukuServiceToggler: inject @ApplicationContext and use
  context.packageName instead of hardcoded PACKAGE_NAME constant

  fall back to openSettings on failure (with AutoOffSettingsOpened event)

fix: add Computed to logging_format on networkloadbalancer (#936)

* fix: add Computed to logging_format on networkloadbalancer to prevent persistent drift

The logging_format attribute was Optional-only. When omitted from config,
the server assigns a default value which the Read function stores in state.
On the next plan Terraform proposed to null it out, but the API ignored the
null, creating an irresolvable drift (issue #918).

Adding Computed: true tells the SDK that the server may populate this field
independently, so Terraform accepts the server-assigned value when the user
does not specify it.

commit.message:
Fix binary/ironman save parsing for web upload

Two root causes prevented binary saves from working:

1. Key type mismatch: PDX parser stores dict keys as strings ("5")
   but _convert() turns referenced values into ints (5). All dict
   lookups in extractor.py used int keys and silently returned empty
   results. Added _db_get() helper that tries both string and int
   key forms.

2. Embedded meta_data not used: melted binary saves embed meta_data
   inside the gamestate (no separate meta file). The upload handler,
   CLI, and extractor now check gamestate.meta_data when meta is
   empty, so player tag resolves to 'GER' instead of '5'.

Also improved population timeseries for melted saves by extracting
channel-based trend_population data from pop_statistics (gives full
historical data instead of a single snapshot value).
